subject: [DOC] Fix graphviz issue in ReadTheDocs
commit_message:
[DOC] Fix graphviz issue in ReadTheDocs

Added the graphviz package.

Issue-ID: DOC-821

Change-Id: I1d82cbf07f9e4c8dc90b69650ea493a94554160e
Signed-off-by: thmsdt <thomas.kulik@telekom.de>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/7109/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/7109/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/7109/ )
